description.ko: ECHO-0는 청각적 지각과 시각적 경험 사이의 간극을 좁히는 실험적 프로젝트로, 복잡한 음향 주파수를 매혹적인 실시간 빛의 조각으로 변환합니다.
description.en: ECHO-0 is an experimental project that bridges the gap between auditory perception and visual experience, translating complex sound frequencies into mesmerizing, real-time light sculptures.

prompt: A futuristic digital art installation titled ECHO-0, visualizing sound waves as vibrant, flowing 3D ribbons of light. The visualization uses a palette of electric blue, violet, and gold against a deep matte black background. Kinetic typography and frequency spectrum bars pulse in sync with an invisible beat. High-resolution, cinematic lighting, octane render, 8k, sleek minimalist design.
